assertion_results.text: Output states HTTP handlers must dispatch through the gomes bus
assertion_results.evidence: Output states 'must always dispatch through the bus using gomes.CommandBus() or gomes.QueryBus()'

assertion_results.text: Output does NOT suggest any scenario where direct repository access from HTTP handler is acceptable
assertion_results.evidence: Output explicitly says 'Calling the repository directly from an HTTP handler violates the hexagonal architecture layer boundaries'; no exception suggested
